title: cerasus discadenia
side_effects: Cerasus discadenia can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Ingestion of large amounts can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems in sensitive individuals. Furthermore, improper use of cerasus discadenia may interact with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions and altering their effectiveness.
